title: diflugossa pinetorum
side_effects: Diflugossa pinetorum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of volatile oils. Ingestion of large amounts may lead to stomach ulcers, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to its essential oils has been linked to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues. Furthermore, improper use of diflugossa pinetorum may interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and heart problems.
